---
title: "Contact & References"
---

## Get in Touch

I'm always happy to chat about data science, potential collaborations, or just say hello.

- {{< fa envelope >}} [vyasjdp@gmail.com](mailto:vyasjdp@gmail.com)
- {{< fa phone >}} +353 899517397
- {{< fa location-dot >}} Dublin, Ireland
- {{< fa brands linkedin >}} [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/vyshnavi-yalamanchi-130900308){target="_blank"}
- {{< fa brands github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com/vyshnaviyalamanchi){target="_blank"}

## References

Available on request. I've worked with faculty at **Dublin City University** (MSc programme and Kilkenny Design practicum) and **GITAM University** (B.Tech thesis).

---

## Tools & Attributions

| Tool | What I Used It For |
|---|---|
| [Quarto](https://quarto.org){target="_blank"} | Building this website |
| [Plotly](https://plotly.com/python/){target="_blank"} | Interactive charts in projects |
| [Bootswatch](https://bootswatch.com){target="_blank"} | CSS theme (Cosmo) |
| [Google Fonts](https://fonts.google.com){target="_blank"} | Source Sans Pro typeface |
| [FontAwesome](https://fontawesome.com){target="_blank"} | Icons |
| [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co){target="_blank"} | BERT models |
| [Groq](https://groq.com){target="_blank"} | LLaMA 3.3 inference |

: Tools and resources used in this portfolio {.hover}
